sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 2.5, 3.0);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, 4.0, 5.5);
SELECT corr(value1, value2) AS correlation FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET value2 = value2 + 1.0 WHERE id = 1;
